action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Joers, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Neubauer, Moore Omokunde, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Smith, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Wall and Larson
